title: Joey Lussick
extract:
Joey Lussick (born 28 December 1995) is a former Australian professional rugby league footballer who most recently played as a hooker for the Parramatta Eels in the National Rugby League.
He previously played for the Manly Warringah and the Parramatta Eels in the NRL, and the Salford Red Devils and St Helens in the Super League.
